retrieved_result: Old Witch's Ring Old Witch's Ring Found Starting gift Trade with Snuggly the Crow - Sunlight Maggot Effect Allows communication with Quelaag's Sister. Not to be confused with Witch's Ring. The Old Witch's Ring is a ring and one of the starting gifts in Dark Souls . In-Game Description Old ring from an old witch. Eng
